ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source from which the sample was derived */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the sample is from */,
  "organism_part" TEXT /* Part of the organism the sample is extracted from */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line associated with the sample */,
  "ancestry_category" TEXT /* Ancestry category of the organism */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the organism at the time of sampling */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the organism */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease state related to the sample */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage of the organism */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of consent for using the sample */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of quality control checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assays" (
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assay */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the assay */,
  "assay_name" TEXT /* Name of the assay conducted */,
  "file_uri" TEXT /* File URI for the assay data */,
  "fraction_identifier" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fraction used in the assay */,
  "technical_replicate" INTEGER /* Technical replicate number associated with the assay */,
  "modification_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters related to modifications applied during the assay */,
  "assay_type" TEXT /* Type of assay (e.g., proteomics, genomics) */,
  "assay_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay was conducted */,
  "assay_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the assay */,
  "biological_replicate" INTEGER /* Biological replicate number */,
  "analysis_software" TEXT /* Software used for analysis */,
  "analysis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assays_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated assay */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification applied (e.g., Acetylation, Phosphorylation) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Specific parameters related to the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was applied */,
  "modification_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assay being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the assay data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the assay data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assay_id FOREIGN KEY ("assay_id") REFERENCES assays ("assay_id")
)
